debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
𝓒 : Finset (Set α)
d : ℕ
h𝓒 : IsNIPWith d ↑𝓒
⊢ IsNIPWith d ↑(@SetFamily.restrictFiniteSymmDiffComponent α 𝓒)

failed_attempts:
h𝓒.mono <| by
    simp_rw [restrictFiniteSymmDiffComponent, Set.image_subset_iff]
    intro A hA
    exact ⟨A, hA, rfl⟩

h𝓒.mono <| by
    intro A hA
    simp only [restrictFiniteSymmDiffComponent, mem_image] at hA
    obtain ⟨B, hB, rfl⟩ := hA
    exact ⟨B, hB, rfl⟩

        cases' hx with hx hx <;> aesop
      · intro hx
        cases' hx with hx₁ hx₂
        by_cases h : x ∈ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B <;> simp_all
    · simp [Set.ext_iff]
      intro x
      simp only [Set.mem_union, Set.mem_iInter, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion, exists_prop,

      split

      · intro hx
        cases' hx with hx₁ hx₂
        by_cases h : x ∈ ⋂ B ∈ 𝓒, B <;> simp_all

    intro A hA
    refine ⟨A, hA, ?_⟩
    ext x
    simp [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_iInter, exists_prop]

h𝓒.mono <| by
